recommendations.title: Basket Case 2
recommendations.overview: Duane and his basket-bound mutant brother are taken in by a secret home for wayward freaks.

recommendations.title: Brain Damage
recommendations.overview: Brian comes under the addictive spell of a parasite with the ability to induce euphoric hallucinations in its hosts.

recommendations.title: Basket Case
recommendations.overview: A young man carrying a big basket that contains his extremely deformed, formerly conjoined twin brother seeks vengeance on the doctors who separated them against their will.

recommendations.title: Frankenhooker
recommendations.overview: A medical school dropout loses his fiancée in a tragic lawnmower incident and decides to bring her back to life. Unfortunately, he was only able to save her head, so he goes to the red light district in the city and lures prostitutes into a hotel roo

recommendations.title: Bad Biology
recommendations.overview: Driven by biological excess, a young man and woman search for sexual fulfillment, unaware of each other's existence. Unfortunately, they eventually meet, and the bonding of these two very unusual human beings ends in an explosive and ultimately over-

recommendations.title: A Bag of Marbles
recommendations.overview: At the beginning of the 1940s, in a France occupied by Nazi forces, lived the Jewish Joffo family. Happy and tight-knit, she sees her future darken when all members of the family are forced to wear the yellow star. Fearing the worst, the parents orga

recommendations.title: Bring Her Back
recommendations.overview: Following the death of their father, a brother and sister are sent to live with a foster mother, only to learn that she is hiding a terrifying secret.

recommendations.title: Concrete Cowboy
recommendations.overview: Sent to live with his estranged father for the summer, a rebellious teen finds kinship in a tight-knit Philadelphia community of Black cowboys.

recommendations.title: Your Christmas or Mine 2
recommendations.overview: They've swapped Christmas – again. Can Hayley and James' relationship survive another turbulent family Christmas or has their future together gone off-piste?!

recommendations.title: The Golem
recommendations.overview: A re-imagining of the old mystical folklore that follows a woman and a tight-knit Jewish community that is besieged by foreign invaders. She conjures a dangerous creature to protect them but it may be more evil than she ever imagined.
